samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_16bit">
    <description>Implement an unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Chip clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="start">Chip enable signal to initiate the multiplication operation.</input>
        <input id="ain" width_description="[15:0]">Input signal representing the multiplicand (a).</input>
        <input id="bin" width_description="[15:0]">Input signal representing the multiplier (b).</input>
        <output id="yout" width_description="[31:0]">Product output signal.</output>
        <output id="done">Chip output flag signal indicating the completion of the multiplication operation.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="i">Shift count register to track the number of shifts performed.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="i" value="0">Shift count register.</reg>
            <reg id="done_r" value="0">Multiplication completion flag.</reg>
            <reg id="areg" value="0">Multiplicand register.</reg>
            <reg id="breg" value="0">Multiplier register.</reg>
            <reg id="yout_r" value="0">Product register.</reg>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <if id="main">
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <not>
                            <input_ref id="rst_n"/>
                        </not>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <then>
                    <assign>
                        <reg_ref id="i"/> = 8'b00000000;
                    </assign>
                </then>
                <else>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <input_ref id="start"/>
                                <leq>
                                    <reg_ref id="i"/>
                                    <bit_const value="17"/>
                                </leq>
                            </and>
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <assign>
                                <reg_ref id="i"/> = <reg_ref id="i"/> + <bit_const value="1"/>; 
                            </assign>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <assign>
                                <reg_ref id="i"/> = 8'b00000000;
                            </assign>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </else>
            </if>
            <if id="done">
                <condition>
                    <eq>
                        <reg_ref id="i"/>
                        <bit_const value="16"/>
                    </eq>
                </condition>
                <then>
                    <assign>
                        <reg_ref id="done_r"/> = 1'b1;
                    </then>
                </if>
                <else>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <eq>
                                <reg_ref id="i"/>
                                <bit_const value="17"/>
                            </eq>
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <assign>
                                <reg_ref id="done_r"/> = 1'b0;
                            </then>
                        </if>
                    </else>
                </else>
            </if>
            <if id="shift_add">
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <eq>
                            <reg_ref id="i"/>
                            <bit_const value="0"/>
                        </eq>
                        <input_ref id="start"/>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <then>
                    <assign>
                        <reg_ref id="areg"/> = <input_ref id="ain"/>;
                        <reg_ref id="breg"/> = <input_ref id="bin"/>;
                    </assign>
                </then>
                <else>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <input_ref id="start"/>
                                <neq>
                                    <reg_ref id="i"/>
                                    <bit_const value="17"/>
                                </neq>
                            </and>
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <if>
                                <condition>
                                    <bit_and>
                                        <reg_ref id="areg"/>
                                        <bit_const value="1"/>
                                    </bit_and>
                                </condition>
                                <then>
                                    <assign>
                                        <reg_ref id="yout_r"/> = (<reg_ref id="yout_r"/> + <reg_ref id="breg"/>) & 32'h7fffffff;
                                    </assign>
                                </then>
                            </if>
                        </then>
                    </if>
                </else>
            </if>
        </combinational_logic>
        <assign>
            <output_ref id="yout"/> = <reg_ref id="yout_r"/>;
        </assign>
    </implementation>
</module>
